creator: wcarson.bugzilla@disillusion.net
text:
Created attachment 223559
www/py-aiohttp-3.6.2 to 3.7.4.post0 patch file

With the release of textproc/py-chardet 4.0.0 today, it broke www/py-aiohttp. I updated the Makefile to point to www/py-aiohttp 3.7.4.post0 since the upstream already had this fixed.

The port built successfully afterwards, as did my dependency (net-im/py-slackclient). I performed no other tests.
